2021-22 Hawaii Rainbow Warriors Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 17-11 (12-5, 2nd in Big West MBB)

Coach: Eran Ganot

PS/G: 68.9 (235th of 358)

PA/G: 64.1 (36th of 358)

SRS: -0.52 (162nd of 358)

SOS: -3.06 (212th of 358)

ORtg: 104.1 (154th of 358)

DRtg: 96.9 (86th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
